subtitle: High-Performance Windows Kernel Latency Engine // Production Release v1.0.0
extreme_desc: Maximizes in-game FPS and eliminates input latency. Restricts background system apps, disables power saving, freezes telemetry cycles, and isolates gaming processes.
balanced_desc: Improves gaming performance and network responsiveness while keeping background services active to permit safe multitasking (web browsing, recording, and streaming).
restore_desc: Wipes injected routing routes, restores display/NIC MSI defaults, re-enables SysMain, restores timers, and unfreezes processes.
dwm_desc: Elevate Desktop Window Manager priority to High to eliminate stutters in borderless games.
search_desc: Disable background Windows indexing to eliminate high SSD write stutters.
hiber_desc: Disable hibernation to free up massive SSD space and reduce kernel wake latency.
hud_safe_default: Core Parking: Active | MSI Mode: Default | TCP Delay: OS Standard
hud_balanced: Core Parking: Disabled | MSI Mode: Locked | TCP Delay: Instant Fire
hud_extreme: Core Parking: Disabled | MSI Mode: Locked | TCP Delay: Instant Fire | Services: Frozen
net_state_opt: Network Latency Engine: Optimized (Instant TCP Active)
cpu_state_opt: CPU Optimization: Engaged (Short-Variable Quantum & Core Unparking)
srv_state_opt: Background Diagnostics & Windows Update: Suspended (Fully Optimized)
srv_state_partial: Background Diagnostics & Windows Update: Partially Suspended
rollback_breakdown:
SYSTEM ROLLBACK PLAN BREAKDOWN:
 1. Revert Core Parking AC/DC indexes
 2. Revert graphics card/NIC MSI parameters
 3. Restore mouse/keyboard buffers to 100
 4. Restart and re-enable service SysMain
 5. Re-align system invariant boot timers
 6. Remove static esports gateway routes
 7. Resume background updater & diagnostic services
